afterToolUse.command: echo '[hook] File modified: checking Python syntax...' && python3 -m py_compile "$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo '')" 2>&1 | head -5 || true

Stop.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished the task" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Task finished' 2>/dev/null || echo '[hook] Task complete.'

beforeToolUse.command: echo "[hook] About to run Bash. Command preview logged."
